title: Brotherhood of the Wolf
posterAlt: Brotherhood of the Wolf (2001) movie poster
tmdbOverview: In 18th century France, the Chevalier de Fronsac and his Native American friend Mani are sent by the King to the Gevaudan province to investigate the killings of hundreds by a mysterious beast.
synopsis: Brotherhood of the Wolf (2001) is a adventure, horror and action film from France. It holds a solid 7.0 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
